eyebrow.es: Breakout de alfabetización en IA generativa · Grado 2
eyebrow.vi: Breakout hiểu biết AI tạo sinh · Lớp 2
eyebrow.ar: تحدّي الثقافة في الذكاء الاصطناعي التوليدي · الصف 2
eyebrow.ur: جنریٹو اے آئی خواندگی بریک آؤٹ · جماعت 2
eyebrow.zh: 生成式AI素养破解 · 二 年级

chrome.sub: An AI helper can help you make things. But it can be wrong, and you must tell the truth about its help. Open four locks to use AI the honest way.
chrome.briefP: An AI helper is a computer helper that makes guesses. When it helps you, you double-check its work and you tell the truth about its help. Read the clues, then open all four locks. Each lock has a reason that shows why the answer is right.
chrome.footerText: Gen AI Literacy Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You learned to tell AI-made work from human-made work, to double-check an AI answer, that a clear ask is called a prompt, and to give credit when AI helped you. Honest and smart. Great work!

clues.title: Made by a machine
clues.body: An AI helper can make words and pictures. Work that a computer helper made from your prompt is AI-made. It came from a machine that guesses, not a person's hand.

clues.title: Made by a person
clues.body: When you draw a picture yourself or write your own story, that is human-made. A living person made it with their own ideas and hands.

clues.title: Check it twice
clues.body: An AI helper is only guessing, so it can be wrong. Smart kids double-check the answer. Ask a grown-up, or look in a source you trust, before you use it.

clues.title: The clear ask
clues.body: The clear ask you type to an AI helper has a name. It is called a prompt. A good prompt tells the AI helper exactly what you want.

clues.title: Tell the truth
clues.body: If an AI helper helped you make something, tell the truth. Say that AI helped. Giving credit is honest, and it shows what you did and what the AI did.

clues.title: A toothy fact
clues.body: A shark can grow new teeth all through its life to replace old ones. That is cool, but it will not open a lock.

locks.title: Who Made It?
locks.q: Which one is AI-made, not human-made?
options: A story a computer helper wrote from your prompt
A crayon drawing you colored yourself
A song your teacher sang out loud to the class
locks.reason: A story a computer helper made from your prompt is AI-made. A drawing you colored and a song your teacher sang are made by living people, so they are human-made.

locks.title: Double-Check It
locks.q: Tap EVERY good way to double-check an AI helper's answer.

items.t: Look it up in a book or source you trust
Compare it with what you already know
Believe it because it sounds very sure
Use it right away without reading it

locks.reason: Good ways to double-check are to ask a grown-up, look in a trusted source, or compare with what you know. Believing it because it sounds sure, or using it without reading, is not checking.

locks.title: Name the Ask
locks.q: The clear ask you type to an AI helper is called a ______.
locks.reason: The clear ask you type to an AI helper is called a prompt. A good prompt tells the AI helper exactly what you want so its answer fits.

locks.title: Give Credit
locks.q: An AI helper helped you make a poster. Tap the steps in the RIGHT order.

pads.e: 🏷️ Tell the truth and give credit

locks.reason: First the AI HELPED you make it. Then you TELL THE TRUTH and give credit for that help. Then you SHARE the poster. Being honest is the right thing to do.
